mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.permission_desc, p.resource_type, p.parent_id, p.path, p.component, p.icon, p.sort_order, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id INNER JOIN user_roles ur ON rp.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND ur.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC

SELECT p.id, p.permission_name, p.permission_code, p.permission_desc, p.resource_type, p.parent_id, p.path, p.component, p.icon, p.sort_order, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM permissions p INNER JOIN role_permissions rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND rp.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC

SELECT id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_desc, resource_type, parent_id, path, component, icon, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM permissions WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY parent_id ASC, sort_order ASC

SELECT id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_desc, resource_type, parent_id, path, component, icon, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM permissions WHERE permission_code = #{permissionCode} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, permission_name, permission_code, permission_desc, resource_type, parent_id, path, component, icon, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at FROM permissions WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
